---
title: "Psych RA Notebook 03 — Pre‑Registration Skeleton & Power"
author: "Austen Siegler"
output: html_document
---

> Minimal pre‑registration skeleton + a small power analysis demo.
>
> **How to use:** Replace bracketed placeholders with your study details; extend sections as needed.

## Study Overview
- **Title:** [Study title]
- **Hypotheses:** [H1: Treatment lowers symptom score vs control]
- **Primary outcome:** [Scale mean (items s1–s6)]
- **Design:** [Between-subjects; Control vs Treatment; 1:1 allocation]

## Variables
- **Inclusion/Exclusion:** [Eligibility criteria; consent]
- **Outcomes:** [Scale mean]; **Covariates:** [Age, gender]
- **Manipulation checks:** [If any]

## Analysis Plan
- **Primary test:** Two-sample t-test (equal variances) on scale_mean
- **Effect size reporting:** Cohen’s d with 95% CI
- **Assumptions:** Normality, homogeneity (visual checks)

```r
# Packages and reproducibility ----
packages <- c("tidyverse","pwr","effectsize","broom")
to_install <- packages[!packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
if (length(to_install) > 0) install.packages(to_install)
lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE)

set.seed(123)
```

### Power (two-sample t-test)
Assume a small-to-moderate effect (d = 0.4) at α = .05, power = .80.

```r
pwr::pwr.t.test(d = 0.4, sig.level = 0.05, power = 0.80,
                type = "two.sample", alternative = "two.sided")
```

### Simulate and test
```r
n_per_group <- 70
d <- 0.4
sd <- 1
mu_c <- 3
mu_t <- mu_c + d*sd

sim <- tibble::tibble(
  condition = rep(c("Control","Treatment"), each = n_per_group),
  scale_mean = c(rnorm(n_per_group, mu_c, sd), rnorm(n_per_group, mu_t, sd))
)

t_out <- t.test(scale_mean ~ condition, data = sim, var.equal = TRUE)
broom::tidy(t_out)

effectsize::cohens_d(scale_mean ~ condition, data = sim)
```

## Data Management
- **Missingness:** [Define thresholds; handling plan]
- **De-identification:** [PHI removal strategy; access controls]
- **Reproducibility:** Store code, metadata, and outputs in versioned folders; knit notebooks to HTML/PDF.

## Deviations
- **Deviations from plan:** [How you will document and justify]  

## Session Info
```r
sessionInfo()
```
